case_title: CHAN, SHU W et al vs. CRANDLE, IRMA JEAN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRANDLE, IRMA JEAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1310 TURK STREET, #201, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, SECURITY DEPOSIT WILL BE RETURNED PER CIVIL CODE SECTIONS REGARDING SECURITY DEPOSIT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, SHU W CHAN, BIANNE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-25-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-01-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

3:45 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFFS SHU W. CHAN AND BIANNE CHAN WHO WERE REPRESENTED BY ATTORNEY ADAM BARASCH, ESQ. OF LAW OFFICES OF STEVEN E. LITTMAN, ESQ. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT IRMA JEAN CRANDLE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 1310 TURK STREET #201 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. AND FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE AGREEMENT. PLTF. WAIVES PAST DUE RENTS AND DAILY DAMAGES. WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 11/15/93. PLTF. WAIVES ATTORNEY FEES AND COST. THE SECURITY DEPOSIT WILL BE RETURNED TO DEFENDANT PROVIDED THE APARTMENT IS LEFT IN CLEAN CONDITION, PER CIVIL CODE SECTIONS REGARDING SECURITY DEPOSITS. 6. PLAINTIFF WILL VACATE THE JUDGMENT HEREIN PROVIDED THAT THE DEFENDANT MOVES BY 11/15/93 AND PROVIDES PLAINTIFF WITH APPROPRIATE PAPERS TO SIGN.
